page: Amazon Web Services r8gn.metal-48xl is a bare-metal, memory-optimized server instance powered by AWS Graviton processors. It features 192 physical cores on an arm64 architecture with a dedicated CPU allocation running at 2.7 GHz. The system provides 1536.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per physical core. There is no simultaneous multithreading, as the instance allocates exactly one thread per physical core.

This instance does not include local NVMe storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached Elastic Block Store volumes. It is network and EBS optimized, delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. The server does not feature any graphics processing units or hardware accelerators, and it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the bare-metal design and high-density arm64 architecture offer a high memory-to-vCPU ratio without the virtualization overhead of hypervisors. This resource profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads that require significant RAM capacity and high network throughput. Appropriate workloads include large-scale in-memory databases, distributed caching layers, real-time big data analytics, and memory-bound enterprise applications.
description: Amazon Web Services r8gn.metal-48xl is a bare-metal, memory-optimized server instance utilizing the arm64 architecture. Powered by AWS Graviton processors, it delivers 192 dedicated physical cores running at 2.7 GHz with one thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 1536.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This instance does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage. It is optimized for network and EBS performance, offering a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. The absence of virtualization overhead on this bare-metal platform, combined with its high memory capacity and network throughput, makes it suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large-scale in-memory databases, distributed caching, and data analytics.

tagline: A bare-metal, arm64 memory-optimized platform featuring one hundred ninety-two dedicated cores, high-density system RAM, and three hundred Gbps network bandwidth.

300 Gbps baseline network bandwidth optimized for EBS connectivity
